tool_input.command:
set -e
SRC="/home/daniel/src/claude-teamwork/teamwork/CLAUDE.md"
DEST=".claude/teamwork-contract.md"
MEM=".claude/CLAUDE.md"
IMPORT_LINE="@teamwork-contract.md"

if [ ! -f "$SRC" ]; then
  echo "ERROR: contract not found at $SRC"
  exit 1
fi

mkdir -p .claude

cp "$SRC" "$DEST"
echo "wrote $DEST"

if [ ! -f "$MEM" ]; then
  printf '# %s — teamwork\n\n%s\n' "$(basename "$PWD")" "$IMPORT_LINE" > "$MEM"
  echo "created $MEM with import"
elif grep -qF "$IMPORT_LINE" "$MEM"; then
  echo "$MEM already imports the contract — no change"
else
  printf '\n%s\n' "$IMPORT_LINE" >> "$MEM"
  echo "appended import to existing $MEM"
fi

echo "note: your root CLAUDE.md was not touched"
tool_input.description: Copy contract and wire import into .claude/CLAUDE.md

tool_response.stdout:
wrote .claude/teamwork-contract.md
created .claude/CLAUDE.md with import
note: your root CLAUDE.md was not touched
